text: Last class you said: I got my first job, I made a decision, I went to a new city.
Today you describe your world now: the company develops medicines and supplies pharmacies.
David, what does your company do in the pharma world?
My company develops new medicines and supplies many pharmacies.
That is interesting. How do you reach the patients?
We launch a new product, and the pharmacy sells it to patients.
And why is your brand so strong?
Our brand is strong because every product helps real patients.
We supply many pharmacies every week.
Our brand is strong and trusted.
The company launches a new product this year.

Hi, I am Carlos, and I work in the pharma world. My company develops new medicines for patients every day. First, a product starts in the laboratory. Then our team supplies thousands of pharmacies across the country. When we launch a new treatment, doctors and patients wait for it. Our brand is strong because people trust it. The market changes fast, but one thing never changes: a patient always needs good treatment. That is why I love this industry.

Hello, my name is Renata, and I work for a big pharma brand. Our company sells medicines to pharmacies in every region. Each morning, my team studies the market and listens to doctors. A patient needs the right treatment at the right time, so we supply our products fast. When the company launches a new medicine, we explain it to every pharmacy. I love this work because our product helps real people. In the pharma world, the patient always comes first.

First, the company develops a new product in the laboratory. Then it tests the treatment for many months. After that, it launches the product on the market. Next, the team supplies the medicine to pharmacies. Finally, the patient gets the treatment and feels better.
The company launches a new product.
Does the market want new medicines?
We launch a new brand this year.
We supply many pharmacies every week.
Our brand is strong and trusted.
The company launches a new product this year.
